old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-562i","title":"[cross-impl] schnorr48_verify_frame requires non-NULL payload even for len=0","description":"C/Zephyr schnorr48_verify_frame (lichen/subsys/lichen/link/schnorr48.c:388) unconditionally rejects NULL payload pointer. Python (schnorr48.py:152) and Rust (schnorr.rs:187) accept empty msg (b\"\" or \u0026[]). The simple schnorr48_verify allows msg=NULL when msg_len==0. This violates \"same algorithm different behavior\" for zero-length payloads in frame signing. Matches test/vectors/schnorr48.json vectors with empty messages. Last 20 commits (coap fixes + merges) did not address this core crypto consistency.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"agent@lichen-project.dev","created_at":"2026-07-23T03:20:58.474441964Z","created_by":"AI Agent","updated_at":"2026-07-23T03:20:58.474441964Z"}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-562i","title":"[cross-impl] schnorr48_verify_frame requires non-NULL payload even for len=0","description":"C/Zephyr schnorr48_verify_frame (lichen/subsys/lichen/link/schnorr48.c:388) unconditionally rejects NULL payload pointer. Python (schnorr48.py:152) and Rust (schnorr.rs:187) accept empty msg (b\"\" or \u0026[]). The simple schnorr48_verify allows msg=NULL when msg_len==0. This violates \"same algorithm different behavior\" for zero-length payloads in frame signing. Matches test/vectors/schnorr48.json vectors with empty messages. Last 20 commits (coap fixes + merges) did not address this core crypto consistency.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"agent@lichen-project.dev","created_at":"2026-07-23T03:20:58.474441964Z","created_by":"AI Agent","updated_at":"2026-07-23T03:24:17.521774687Z","started_at":"2026-07-23T03:24:17.521774687Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-23T03:29:17.521774687Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-23T03:24:17.521774687Z"}
